Electronic Press Kit

// The Band

The Story

Kendall Hunt and The Shooters are the kind of band that shows up to make the room move. Built on red dirt, Texas country, classic rock, crowd-favorite covers, and catchy originals — the band delivers a high-energy live show with big vocals, driving guitars, and a setlist designed for singing along, dancing, and keeping the party going.

Whether they're packing the dance floor or playing to someone hearing them for the first time — the crowd stays connected all night.

Fronted by Kendall Hunt from the Texas Panhandle, The Shooters bring a seasoned, professional stage presence to bars, rodeos, city events, private parties, festivals, and outdoor stages. They blend familiar songs with original material in a way that keeps the energy locked in from the first note to the last call.

🤠Texas Panhandle Roots
🎵Originals + Crowd Favorites
